title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IRCTC Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!
